word: H2904 - טוּל - ṭûwl - tool - Carry away

sections.paragraph:
Original: טוּל

Transliteration: ṭûl

Phonetic: tool

BDB Definition:

  1. to hurl, cast
    1. (Pilpel) to throw away, carry away, hurl
    2. (Hiphil) to throw, cast, cast out
    3. (Hophal)
      1. to be hurled, hurled down
      2. to be cast, be thrown, be cast out, be thrown down

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 797

Part(s) of speech: Verb
